Off Calendar Oct-25-2005 Text Ruling

Apportionment Of Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Oct-25-2005 Continued To Nov-10-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion for an Order to Distribute Settlement Funds Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori cheshire.
Andrew Chew, Esq. for Plaintiff/Decedent: Lawrence Elliott.
Joseph G. Peatman, Esq. for Wrongful Death Heirs: Eileen Elliott and Lana Schultheiss, also preesent.
No appearance by Larry Elliott, Legal Heir of Decedent.
After hearing the evidence presented and Declarations filed, the Court grants Motion to Distribute Settlement Funds.
Fees and Costs granted.
Matter is continued to Nov. 10, 2005 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for Mr. Peatman to submit a declaration as to the break-down of the proceeds, as an attachment to Mr. Chew's Proposed Order.
Appearances are waived.
